name: pymetdecoder

metadata.name: pymetdecoder
metadata.summary: Python module to decode/encode met reports e.g. SYNOPs

functions.name: pymetdecoder.conversion._convert
documentation: Converts a value using y = mx + c

functions.name: pymetdecoder.conversion.convert
documentation:
Converts value from one unit to another

```
param numeric val

Value to convert

param str unit_from

Convert from this unit

param str unit_to

Convert to this unit

param str unit_type

Type of unit

returns

Converted value

rtype

numeric
```

functions.name: pymetdecoder.conversion._convert_si
documentation:
Converts SI prefixes from one to another (e.g. from mm to km)

```
param numeric val

Value to convert

param str prefix_from

Prefix to convert from (e.g. "k" for "km")

param str prefix_to

Prefix to convert to (e.g. "k" for "km")

returns

Converted value

rtype

numeric
```

functions.name: pymetdecoder.conversion._convert_time
documentation:
Converts time values from one unit to another

```
param numeric val

Value to convert

param str unit_from

Unit to convert from

param str unit_to

Unit to convert to

param str unit_type

Type of unit (e.g. time)

returns

Converted value

rtype

numeric
```

functions.name: pymetdecoder.conversion._convert_temp
documentation:
Converts time values from one unit to another

```
param numeric val

Value to convert

param str unit_from

Unit to convert from

param str unit_to

Unit to convert to

returns

Converted value

rtype

numeric
```

Base class for a meteorological report

classes.name: pymetdecoder.Observation

methods.name: pymetdecoder.Observation.__init__
documentation: def __init__(self, raw, unit=None, availability=True, value=None, noValAttr=False):

methods.name: pymetdecoder.Observation.decode
documentation: Decodes raw value into observation value(s)

methods.name: pymetdecoder.Observation.encode
documentation: Encodes observation into a coded value

methods.name: pymetdecoder.Observation._decode
documentation: Actual decode function. Mostly implemented in subclasses

methods.name: pymetdecoder.Observation._encode
documentation: Actual encode function. Mostly implemented in subclasses

methods.name: pymetdecoder.Observation.is_available
documentation:
Checks if the value is available

```
param anything value

Value to check

param string char

Character to use to determine if value is available

returns

False if value is not available (i.e. report contains /), otherwise True

rtype

boolean
```

methods.name: pymetdecoder.Observation.is_valid
documentation:
Checks if the value is valid. Wrapper to \_is_valid()

```
param anything value

Value to check

param boolean raise_exception

If True, raises exception if not valid

returns

True if value is valid, False otherwise

rtype

boolean
```

methods.name: pymetdecoder.Observation._is_valid
documentation:
Actual validity check

```
returns

True if value is valid, False otherwise

rtype

boolean
```

Base class for an Observation

:param string/int raw: Raw value of observation
:param string unit: Unit of measurement for the observation
:param boolean availability: Check for the availability of this observation
:param anything value: Calculated value of the observation
:param boolean noValAttr: If true, do not set value attribute for this observation

functions.name: pymetdecoder.code_tables.check_range
documentation:
Function to check if a given value is in the allowed range for the code table

```
param string x

Value to check

param string table

Code table

param int min

Minimum value

param int max

Maximum value

param string nullChar

Character representing a null value (default "/")

returns

Integer value of x or x as string if not available

rtype

int or string

raises

pymetdecoder.DecodeError if x is invalid
```

classes.name: pymetdecoder.code_tables.CodeTableSimple
documentation:
Simple code table for returning a value in a given range. Used for tables
where a value corresponds to a long description

documentation: Simple code table for returning a value from a list of possible values

Amount of precipitation or water equivalent of solid precipitation, or diameter

classes.name: pymetdecoder.code_tables.CodeTable3590A

modules.name: pymetdecoder.synop.observations
documentation: * Fixed erroneous error message for temperatures (#10)
* Fixed incorrect handling of pressures > 1050 hPa (#16)

classes.name: pymetdecoder.synop.observations.CloudCover
documentation:
Cloud cover

* N(ddff) - Total cloud cover

classes.name: pymetdecoder.synop.observations.Callsign
documentation:
Callsign

* D...D - Ship's callsign consisting of three or more alphanumeric characters
* Abnnn - WMO regional association area

documentation: Clouds with tops below station level (section 4)

classes.name: pymetdecoder.synop.observations.Evapotranspiration
documentation: Daily amount of evaporation or evapotranspiration

classes.name: pymetdecoder.synop.observations.GroundMinimumTemperature
documentation:
Ground (grass) minimum temperature of the preceding night, in whole degrees Celsius
(Region I only)

classes.name: pymetdecoder.synop.observations.GroundState
documentation: Ground state without snow or measurable ice cover

classes.name: pymetdecoder.synop.observations.GroundStateSnow
documentation: Ground state with snow or measurable ice cover

classes.name: pymetdecoder.synop.observations.LocalPrecipitation
documentation: Precipitation character and time of precipitation for Region I

classes.name: pymetdecoder.synop.observations.LocationMaxConcentration

classes.name: pymetdecoder.synop.observations.MaxLowCloudConcentration

classes.name: pymetdecoder.synop.observations.MountainCondition

classes.name: pymetdecoder.synop.observations.PhenomSpeedDir

Time at which precipitation given by RRR began or ended and duration and

methods.name: pymetdecoder.synop.SYNOP._decode
documentation: Decodes the SYNOP and sets the data attribute with the information

methods.name: pymetdecoder.synop.SYNOP._is_valid_group
documentation:
Internal function to check if group is valid. In most cases, a valid group
is 5 alphanumeric characters and/or slashes

```
param string group

SYNOP code to decode

param int length

Desired length of group

param boolean allowSlashes

Slashes (/) are allowed in this group

param boolean multipleGroups

Check for multiple groups

returns

True if group contains all valid characters and is correct length, False otherwise

rtype

boolean
```
